name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Fort Worth, TX residents can visit Cash America Pawn at 4014 E Lancaster Ave for fast cash loans and pawn services.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn in Fort Worth, TX is located at 4014 E Lancaster Ave, serving the East Lancaster neighborhood with convenient pawn and lending services. The location is open Monday through Friday from 9AM to 6PM, Saturday 10AM to 6PM, and closed Sundays. This standalone location is easily accessible for Fort Worth residents looking for quick cash solutions.

At the 4014 E Lancaster Ave location in Fort Worth, TX, you can pawn items for immediate cash, take out title loans, or purchase previously pawned merchandise. Contact the Fort Worth branch at +1 817-534-8001 to ask about current inventory or discuss your pawn options. The staff can assist with jewelry, electronics, tools, and other valuable items.

When visiting this Cash America Pawn in Fort Worth, bring a valid ID and proof of ownership or documentation for the items you're pawning. The straightforward process helps Fort Worth residents access emergency funds quickly without credit checks. This location has been serving the local community as a trusted pawn shop alternative.
address: 4014 E Lancaster Ave, Fort Worth, TX 76103

company_info.headquarters: 4014 E Lancaster Ave, Fort Worth, TX 76103

pros: Largest pawn network with 3,300+ locations ensuring availability and consistent operations across regions
Immediate cash disbursement on-site—no waiting periods or credit checks required
Non-recourse loans mean you owe nothing beyond the pledged collateral if unable to repay
Buys wide variety of merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, appliances) creating liquidity options
Publicly traded company with transparent operations and significant capitalization ($22,000 employees)
Layaway service alternative allowing 10% down payments for retail purchases without pawn lending
Gold and precious metals buying service for quick conversion of valuables to cash
cons: Pawn loans require surrendering personal property, creating loss risk if unable to reclaim items within loan term
Interest rates on pawn loans are typically high (though specific rates not disclosed on website) compared to traditional personal loans
Non-transparent pricing—website does not disclose interest rates, fees, or loan terms, requiring in-store inquiry
Collateral must have resale value, excluding many items and limiting access for consumers with fewer valuable possessions
Reclaimed items may depreciate in value during loan period, creating financial inefficiency vs. traditional lending
best_for: Consumers needing emergency cash ($100-$5,000+) within hours who lack credit or traditional loan access
People with valuable personal property (jewelry, electronics, instruments) willing to pledge collateral for short-term liquidity
Individuals seeking fast retail goods through layaway without credit checks or long approval processes
Those selling gold, silver, or platinum for immediate cash without pawn loan obligations
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for cash-constrained consumers facing immediate financial needs who own valuable collateral and want fast, no-credit-check liquidity. The main caveat is that pawn lending inherently carries high costs (interest + potential collateral loss), making it appropriate only as a short-term emergency solution rather than primary financing, and rates/terms should be verified in-store before pledging items.
services: Non-recourse pawn loans secured by personal property pledges
Retail sales of used and consignment merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Gold, silver, and precious metals buying and immediate cash payment
Layaway payment plans with 10% down flexible financing for retail purchases
Store locator and inventory search tools
Merchandise buying services ("we buy almost anything of value")
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through AFF subsidiary (15,000+ merchant partners)
Point-of-sale technology and payment solutions for partner retailers
Online store locator with 2,500+ store listings across North and Latin America
